coveredCategories.architecture: Two repos (specweave + vskill). normalizeFrontmatter() in plugin-copier.ts for non-Claude copies. fetchLocal() in source-fetcher.ts for local:specweave skill updates.
coveredCategories.integrations: No new integrations. Uses existing adapter system and vskill lockfile contract. specweave writes lockfile, vskill reads it.
coveredCategories.ui-ux: No UI. CLI-only changes: vskill update defaults to --all, specweave refresh-plugins normalizes frontmatter silently.
coveredCategories.performance: SHA comparison prevents unnecessary re-installs. No performance-sensitive paths affected.
coveredCategories.security: No security implications. Skills are local files copied between directories. vskill update already runs tier-1 security scan.
coveredCategories.edge-cases: Plugin cache missing: fetchLocal() returns null, skill skipped gracefully. Multi-line hooks YAML: regex handles indented continuation lines. Empty frontmatter: creates new block with name+description.
